ahu-panel.intro: Need a dependable AHU panel surveyed, repaired or replaced across Greater Manchester and the wider North West? Icomply Property Services design, install and commission air-handling control panels for commercial blocks, industrial sites and multi-tenant estates. From Stockport we support AHU panels linked to fans, dampers, sensors and BMS interfaces, with clear fixed-price quotes after survey and documentation your facilities team can file with insurers and landlords.
ahu-panel.body: An AHU panel is the electrical heart of many air-handling plants: it sequences motors, interlocks safety devices and presents faults to building management systems. Our engineers diagnose failed contactors, relays, MCBs, transformers and control boards, then either repair in situ or supply a replacement panel built to the site’s load and control philosophy. We work alongside AOV and smoke-control packages where the same riser or plant room serves both comfort ventilation and fire strategy. Based in Stockport (SK2), we cover Cheshire, Lancashire, Merseyside and Cumbria with planned maintenance and reactive call-outs. Tell us the panel make, photos of the wiring diagram and your postcode for a same-week attendance target where capacity allows.
ahu-panel.meta_desc: AHU panel install, repair & commissioning across Greater Manchester & the North West. Icomply engineers from Stockport. Fixed-price quotes.
focus_points: Survey of existing AHU panel, controls and safety interlocks
Repair, retrofit or full panel replacement with fixed-price scope
Commissioning, labelling and handover records for FM and auditors
Integration support for fans, dampers, sensors and BMS signals
faq: What does an AHU panel control?
Typically supply and extract fans, heating/cooling coils, dampers, filters status, frost protection and safety trips, often with a link to a BMS or local HMI.
Can you replace an obsolete AHU panel without redesigning the whole plant?
Yes in many cases. We reverse-engineer the existing I/O, match motor ratings and interlocks, and commission a modern panel while reusing viable field devices.
Do you cover AHU panel work outside Stockport?
Yes. We work across Greater Manchester, Cheshire, Lancashire, Merseyside and Cumbria from our Stockport base.
ahu-panel.seo_keywords: AHU panel, AHU control panel, air handling unit panel, AHU panel repair, AHU panel installation North West, AHU panel Manchester, AHU panel Stockport, HVAC control panel, commercial AHU electrics

ahu-inverter-drive.intro: Searching for professional AHU inverter drive support with transparent pricing and competent commissioning? Icomply supply, install and programme variable-speed drives on air-handling units for landlords, FM teams and industrial clients across the North West. Our engineers size drives to motor duty, set acceleration profiles, wire safety circuits correctly and leave clear parameters so your plant runs efficiently without nuisance trips.
ahu-inverter-drive.body: Fitting an inverter (VSD) to an AHU fan motor is one of the fastest ways to cut energy use and soft-start large fans. We assess motor plate data, cable lengths, EMC requirements and control signals from the AHU panel or BMS, then install and commission the drive with proper filtering, earthing and isolation. Fault-finding covers overcurrent trips, earth faults, encoder issues and communication errors on popular industrial brands. Planned visits can include parameter backup, cooling checks and thermal imaging of power stages. From Stockport we serve multi-site estates needing consistent drive standards across their portfolio. Request a quote with motor kW, voltage and photos of the existing starter arrangement.
ahu-inverter-drive.meta_desc: AHU inverter drive install, programming & fault-finding. Stockport engineers covering Greater Manchester & the North West.
focus_points: Drive selection matched to fan motor duty and control signals
Installation with isolation, EMC practice and correct cabling
Parameter setup, commissioning and fault diagnostics
Energy and soft-start benefits explained for FM and finance teams
faq: Will an inverter work with my existing AHU motor?
Most three-phase induction motors can be inverted if insulation, cooling and cable arrangements are suitable. We check the plate data and installation before quoting.
Do you reprogramme drives after a power failure or replacement?
Yes. We restore or re-enter parameters, verify I/O mapping and run functional tests on fans and interlocks.
Can inverters integrate with our BMS?
Common options include 0–10 V, 4–20 mA, digital start/stop and network cards where specified. We confirm protocol during survey.
ahu-inverter-drive.seo_keywords: AHU inverter drive, AHU VSD, air handling unit inverter, fan speed drive, HVAC inverter install, AHU drive commissioning, inverter drive North West, Manchester AHU VSD, Stockport

ahu-commissioning.intro: Want AHU commissioning handled by engineers who work to practical UK plant and smoke-control expectations? Icomply commission air-handling units after install, refurbishment or major component changes, verifying electrical safety, control sequences, interlocks and documentation. We support commercial landlords, industrial sites and apartment blocks across Greater Manchester from our Stockport base with clear fixed-price commissioning scopes.
ahu-commissioning.body: Commissioning is more than a power-up: it proves that the AHU starts, stops and fails safe as designed. Our process typically includes visual inspection, insulation and continuity checks where required, motor rotation, damper end-switch verification, sensor calibration checks, sequence of operation tests and record sheets your consultant or principal contractor can sign off. Where AHUs form part of a smoke or AOV strategy, we coordinate with fire cause-and-effect testing so ventilation modes align with the fire strategy. Post-commissioning we can enrol plant on a maintenance plan to protect warranties and reduce call-outs. Cover extends across Cheshire, Lancashire, Merseyside and Cumbria. Share drawings, panel schedules and access windows when you enquire.
ahu-commissioning.meta_desc: AHU commissioning for commercial & industrial plant across the North West. Icomply Stockport — sequences, interlocks & handover packs.
focus_points: Structured electrical and controls commissioning checklist
Sequence of operation tests for fans, dampers and safeties
Cause-and-effect coordination where smoke modes apply
Handover records suitable for consultants and building control
faq: When should AHU commissioning take place?
After installation or major modifications, and before practical completion or tenant occupation where ventilation is life-safety or critical to occupation.
Do you commission existing AHUs after a panel upgrade?
Yes. We re-validate sequences, safeties and I/O mapping so the plant behaves as intended with the new controls.
What documents do you leave on site?
Commissioning sheets, parameter notes, as-found/as-left comments and certificates relevant to the electrical or smoke-control scope agreed.
ahu-commissioning.seo_keywords: AHU commissioning, air handling unit commissioning, HVAC commissioning North West, AHU handover, plant commissioning Manchester, AHU sequence testing, Stockport AHU

air-handling-unit-certification.intro: Looking for air handling unit certification support that stands up to audits, insurers and landlord compliance reviews? Icomply inspect, test and document AHU-related electrical and smoke-control interfaces across the North West. We issue service certificates, actuator and control test records, and clear remedial schedules so facilities managers know exactly what is compliant and what needs attention.
air-handling-unit-certification.body: Certification requirements vary by system role: comfort-only plant may need electrical installation or service records, while AHUs contributing to smoke control demand tighter testing against the fire strategy and standards such as BS 9991 and EN 12101 practice. We survey panels, drives, sensors, dampers and power supplies, record results and highlight defects with prioritised recommendations. Multi-site landlords can standardise reporting across estates for smoother board and insurance reviews. Based in Stockport, our engineers attend Greater Manchester, Lancashire, Cheshire, Merseyside and Cumbria. Book certification visits ahead of fire risk assessment renewals or after major plant changes.
air-handling-unit-certification.meta_desc: Air handling unit certification & test records for landlords and FM. Icomply cover Greater Manchester & the North West from Stockport.
focus_points: Inspection and testing aligned to the AHU’s safety role
Service certificates and clear pass/fail recording
Remedial schedules prioritised for risk and cost
Support for fire strategy interfaces and insurer evidence
faq: Is AHU certification a legal certificate like a CP12?
There is no single universal ‘AHU certificate’ equivalent to landlord gas safety; documentation depends on electrical, maintenance and fire strategy obligations for your building type.
How often should AHUs be certified or tested?
Follow manufacturer guidance, your fire risk assessment and any smoke-control maintenance regime. Many sites combine annual thorough checks with interim PPM visits.
Can you certify after a third-party install?
We can inspect and test as-found plant and document results, noting any limitations where design information is incomplete.
air-handling-unit-certification.seo_keywords: air handling unit certification, AHU certification, AHU test certificate, HVAC compliance North West, AHU service certificate, Manchester AHU inspection, Stockport

hvac-electrical-installation.intro: Planning HVAC electrical installation for new plant, a refurbishment or a multi-tenant block? Icomply design and install power and controls for AHUs, fan coils, condensers and associated plant to BS 7671, with coordination for isolation, containment and labelling that facilities teams can live with. Stockport-based engineers deliver fixed-price quotes after survey across Greater Manchester and the North West.
hvac-electrical-installation.body: HVAC electrical work often fails when plant is powered without adequate local isolation, correctly rated protection or thought-through control cabling. We install supply circuits, local isolators, panel feeds, field wiring to sensors and actuators, and cable management suitable for plant rooms and risers. Where smoke vents or AOVs share infrastructure, we keep life-safety circuits distinct and documented. Testing includes dead and live tests appropriate to the scope, with installation certificates when the job includes new circuits. Ideal for mechanical contractors needing a reliable electrical partner, and for landlords modernising ageing plant. Cover spans Cheshire, Lancashire, Merseyside and Cumbria.

Coordination with mechanical contractors and FM access rules

Yes. We commonly attend joint site meetings, follow agreed drawings and programme electrical works around plant delivery dates.
Can you upgrade old plant room electrics without full rewire?
Often yes — we target non-compliant boards, undersized cables and missing isolators first, then phase further improvements.
Are EV or general building electrics included?
Those sit under our wider electrical service. This page focuses on HVAC plant power and controls; we can package both if needed.
hvac-electrical-installation.seo_keywords: HVAC electrical installation, AHU electrical install, plant room electrics, HVAC wiring North West, BS 7671 HVAC, Manchester HVAC electrical, Stockport plant electrics

air-handling-system-repair.intro: Need fast, professional air handling system repair when fans stop, panels trip or dampers fail mid-shift? Icomply diagnose and repair commercial and industrial air-handling systems across the North West, restoring ventilation with transparent scope and fixed pricing after assessment. From Stockport we support landlords, factories and multi-site FM teams who cannot afford prolonged downtime.
air-handling-system-repair.body: Common faults include burned contactors, failed drive modules, seized actuators, dirty or collapsed filters triggering trips, sensor drift and water damage to outdoor control gear. Our engineers arrive with diagnostic tools, isolate safely, identify root cause and either repair on the day or order genuine-equivalent parts with a clear follow-up plan. Temporary safe isolation can keep other plant online while critical components are replaced. We also advise when repair is uneconomic versus panel or drive replacement. After repair we retest sequences and leave notes for your logbook. Reactive cover across Greater Manchester, Cheshire, Lancashire, Merseyside and Cumbria — send fault photos and any BMS alarms when you call.
air-handling-system-repair.meta_desc: Air handling system repair across Greater Manchester & the North West. Icomply reactive AHU engineers from Stockport.
focus_points: Rapid diagnosis of electrical, control and actuator faults
On-site repair or planned parts return with clear pricing
Safe isolation and temporary measures where appropriate
Post-repair functional tests and logbook notes
faq: How quickly can you attend an AHU breakdown?
We aim for same-week reactive visits and prioritise critical sites when engineers are available. Call early with postcode and fault details.
Do you repair only electrics, or mechanical parts too?
Our strength is electrical controls, panels, drives and linked actuators. Purely mechanical fan rebuilds may be coordinated with specialist partners.
Will you work on any brand of AHU?
Yes for most commercial plant. Access to drawings and nameplate data speeds diagnosis.
air-handling-system-repair.seo_keywords: air handling system repair, AHU repair, HVAC repair North West, air handling unit fault, AHU breakdown, Manchester AHU repair, Stockport HVAC engineer

Our commercial AHU maintenance programmes schedule filter regime reminders (where in scope), electrical tightness checks, contactor and terminal inspections, inverter cooling path checks, sensor sanity checks and damper free-movement tests. We record defects with photos and prioritise life-safety related issues first. Multi-site packages align visit windows so regional managers see consistent standards. We can combine AHU PPM with AOV and smoke vent servicing where the estate uses both. Cover includes Cheshire, Lancashire, Merseyside and Cumbria. Ask for a sample schedule matched to your plant list.

faq: How often should commercial AHUs be maintained?
Many sites choose quarterly or six-monthly PPM plus annual deeper checks; critical environments may need more frequent visits.
Does maintenance include filter changes?
It can when agreed in the contract and access/stock is arranged. Some clients keep filters in-house — we then verify status and report issues.
Can maintenance reduce energy costs?
Yes. Cleaner sensors, healthy drives and correct fan speeds cut wasted power and improve comfort control.

wander-alert-system.intro: Want a wander alert system to help protect residents at risk of leaving a care home unnoticed? Icomply supply, install and maintain door wander alerts and related monitoring for care providers across Greater Manchester and the North West. From Stockport we survey exits, fit sensors or wearable tags as appropriate, and train staff on response without creating a prison-like environment.
wander-alert-system.body: Wander alert systems support dignity and safety for residents living with dementia or cognitive impairment. Solutions range from door alarms and delayed egress interfaces to wearable tags and loitering detection — always subject to care planning, MCA considerations and fire evacuation strategy. We coordinate with fire door hardware and nurse call so alerts are meaningful, not ignored noise. Installations include staff indicators, logging where available and PPM for batteries and sensors. Staff training and maintenance of alert devices
faq: Is a wander alert a restraint?
Technology must support person-centred care and legal frameworks — we implement equipment; care decisions remain with the provider.
Will it stop fire evacuation?
No design should impede escape. We work with fire strategies and appropriate delayed egress hardware where approved.
Can it integrate with nurse call?
Often yes — door or tag events can raise staff alerts on the same response platform.
